# Official Towel Requisition Guidelines (Galactic Bureaucracy Division)

FORM 27B-STROKE-6: Application for Regulation Towel (Standard Issue)

Any sentient being traveling through the Galaxy should know where their towel is. A towel, as any experienced hitchhiker will tell you, is about the most massively useful thing an interstellar traveler can have. Partly because it has great practical value — you can wrap it around you for warmth, wave it in emergencies as a distress signal, or use it for hand-to-hand combat.

More importantly, a towel has immense psychological value. For some reason, if a strag discovers that a hitchhiker has their towel with them, they will automatically assume that they also have a toothbrush, a change of clothes, food, and a cup of tea. What the strag will think is that any being who can hitch the length and breadth of the Galaxy, rough it, and still know where their towel is, is clearly someone to be reckoned with.

Standard issue towels are available in the following colors: Mostly Harmless Beige, Panic-Free Blue, and Don't Forget Green. All towels must be registered with the local branch of the Galactic Bureaucracy Division within 30 standard days of acquisition. Failure to register your towel is technically an offense, but since the Bureaucracy Division has a 200-year backlog, nobody has ever actually been prosecuted.
